dataPolicy.intendedUse: Shared project test data and demos; not normative product documentation.

description: A synthetic, domain-specific organizational corpus for Cornerstone ingestion, evidence review, ontology extraction, graph serving, and evaluation tests.

documents.reviewIntent: Use as broad concept vocabulary and alias coverage.
documents.title: HelioPharm Cold Chain Domain Glossary
